title: viola missouriensis
intro: Viola missouriensis, also known as the Missouri violet, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Violaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Viola missouriensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including sore throats and digestive issues.
